case_groups.title: gRPC request and response size boundary
HTTP request and response size boundary
Success, partial, retry and disconnect behavior
Deployment authentication, data and resource boundary

cases.title: Stable Trace request
cases.objective: Decode a minimum valid OTLP Trace request in the selected stable scope.

source_requirement_refs.section: Maturity levels and OTLP/Protobuf Trace request

preconditions: DQ-022 must be human-decided before the candidate becomes a normative adopted reference
DQ-018 must explicitly authorize implementation before this case is executed
Execution must use offline synthetic fixtures and must not create a network listener
cases.stimulus: Decode a deterministic minimum valid ExportTraceServiceRequest fixture.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Decode selected stable fields and emit metadata-only admission material.
expected_outcome.required_state: No Evidence ID, identity, permission or execution result is created.

evidence_requirements: decoder implementation commit and artifact digest
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must be human-decided before the candidate becomes a normative adopted reference
DQ-018 must explicitly authorize implementation before this case is executed
Execution must use offline synthetic fixtures and must not create a network listener

cases.stimulus: Decode a deterministic minimum valid ExportMetricsServiceRequest fixture.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Decode selected stable fields and emit metadata-only admission material.
expected_outcome.required_state: Metric temporality and schema limitations remain explicit; no Evidence is created.

evidence_requirements: decoder implementation commit and artifact digest
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must be human-decided before the candidate becomes a normative adopted reference
DQ-018 must explicitly authorize implementation before this case is executed
Execution must use offline synthetic fixtures and must not create a network listener

preconditions: DQ-022 must be human-decided before the candidate becomes a normative adopted reference
DQ-018 must explicitly authorize implementation before this case is executed
Execution must use offline synthetic fixtures and must not create a network listener
cases.stimulus: Decode a deterministic minimum valid ExportLogsServiceRequest fixture without retaining raw log body content.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Decode selected metadata fields; content capture remains disabled.
expected_outcome.required_state: No raw log content or Evidence Object is persisted.

evidence_requirements: decoder implementation commit and artifact digest
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must be human-decided before the candidate becomes a normative adopted reference

cases.title: Profiles excluded
cases.objective: Fail closed on the Development Profiles signal in the TMAI v0.1 selected scope.
preconditions: DQ-022 must be human-decided before the candidate becomes a normative adopted reference
DQ-018 must explicitly authorize implementation before this case is executed
Execution must use offline synthetic fixtures and must not create a network listener
cases.stimulus: Present a syntactically valid Profiles request to the offline selected-scope decoder.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Reject as unsupported selected-scope signal with a stable bounded reason.
expected_outcome.required_state: No fallback mapping to Trace, Metric, Log, Evidence or Execution is allowed.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must be human-decided before the candidate becomes a normative adopted reference
DQ-018 must explicitly authorize implementation before this case is executed
Execution must use offline synthetic fixtures and must not create a network listener

cases.title: Process Context excluded from OTLP transport
cases.objective: Prevent Development Process Context messages from being treated as OTLP transport payloads.

source_requirement_refs.section: Process Context is Development and is not part of OTLP transport

preconditions: DQ-022 must be human-decided before the candidate becomes a normative adopted reference
DQ-018 must explicitly authorize implementation before this case is executed
Execution must use offline synthetic fixtures and must not create a network listener
cases.stimulus: Present a ProcessContext message or descriptor as though it were an OTLP export request.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Reject as outside the selected OTLP transport scope.
expected_outcome.required_state: No entity, execution, evidence or capability context is inferred.

required_observations: no decoder routing to OTLP signal services
authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must be human-decided before the candidate becomes a normative adopted reference
DQ-018 must explicitly authorize implementation before this case is executed
Execution must use offline synthetic fixtures and must not create a network listener

cases.title: Additive unknown protobuf field compatibility
cases.objective: Verify wire compatibility without promoting unknown protobuf fields into TMAI semantics.
preconditions: DQ-022 must be human-decided before the candidate becomes a normative adopted reference
DQ-018 must explicitly authorize implementation before this case is executed
Execution must use offline synthetic fixtures and must not create a network listener
cases.stimulus: Decode old-to-new and new-to-old selected-stable fixtures containing additive unknown protobuf fields.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Known fields are processed and additive unknown wire fields do not alone cause rejection; mapped TMAI output remains exact-allowlist and records compatibility limitations.
expected_outcome.required_state: Unknown fields never gain identity, authority, evidence or evaluation meaning.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must be human-decided before the candidate becomes a normative adopted reference
DQ-018 must explicitly authorize implementation before this case is executed
Execution must use offline synthetic fixtures and must not create a network listener

cases.title: Malformed protobuf
cases.objective: Reject malformed or truncated protobuf deterministically and within resource bounds.
preconditions: DQ-022 must be human-decided before the candidate becomes a normative adopted reference
DQ-018 must explicitly authorize implementation before this case is executed
Execution must use offline synthetic fixtures and must not create a network listener
cases.stimulus: Decode malformed, truncated, invalid-wire-type and bounded nesting-depth fixtures.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Reject before admission with bounded stable error; do not crash or expose payload content.
expected_outcome.required_state: No partial admission or false success is retained.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must be human-decided before the candidate becomes a normative adopted reference
DQ-018 must explicitly authorize implementation before this case is executed
Execution must use offline synthetic fixtures and must not create a network listener

cases.title: Empty export request
cases.objective: Preserve OTLP empty-message validity without inventing telemetry items.
preconditions: DQ-022 must be human-decided before the candidate becomes a normative adopted reference
DQ-018 must explicitly authorize implementation before this case is executed
Execution must use offline synthetic fixtures and must not create a network listener
cases.stimulus: Decode valid empty Trace, Metric and Log export requests.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Return valid no-item outcome; create no Telemetry Admission material and no Evidence.
expected_outcome.required_state: Protocol validity is not an execution or evidence fact.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must be human-decided before the candidate becomes a normative adopted reference
DQ-018 must explicitly authorize implementation before this case is executed
Execution must use offline synthetic fixtures and must not create a network listener

cases.title: gRPC inbound request below 64 MiB
cases.objective: Exercise post-decompression server request handling below the reference maximum.
preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Send a valid request one byte below the frozen 64 MiB post-decompression reference boundary.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Request is eligible for normal processing subject to all other validation.
expected_outcome.required_state: Size acceptance alone does not prove semantic admission.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen

cases.title: gRPC inbound request exactly 64 MiB
cases.objective: Prove deterministic inclusive/exclusive behavior at the frozen request boundary.
preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Send a valid request exactly equal to the frozen 64 MiB post-decompression boundary.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: When the frozen maximum is 64 MiB, the request is not rejected solely for size; all other validation still applies.
expected_outcome.required_state: Boundary acceptance is hop-local only.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen

cases.title: gRPC inbound request above 64 MiB
cases.objective: Reject an oversized post-decompression request without processing it.
preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Send a valid request one byte above the frozen 64 MiB post-decompression boundary.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Return non-retryable RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED and do not process telemetry items.
expected_outcome.required_state: No whole-request retry, partial admission or Evidence is allowed.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen

cases.title: gRPC client request above 64 MiB pre-compression
cases.objective: Prevent an oversized outbound request from being transmitted.
preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Construct a request one byte above the frozen 64 MiB pre-compression boundary.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Client does not send the request and records a terminal local oversize outcome.
expected_outcome.required_state: No receiver acceptance or network delivery is inferred.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen

cases.title: gRPC client response at or below 4 MiB
cases.objective: Exercise post-decompression response handling within the frozen response limit.
preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Return valid responses one byte below and exactly equal to the frozen 4 MiB post-decompression boundary.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Client parses the response subject to normal protocol validation.
expected_outcome.required_state: Response parsing proves only the current hop outcome.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen

cases.title: gRPC client response above 4 MiB
cases.objective: Fail safely on an oversized post-decompression response and retain unknown request acceptance.
preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Return a response one byte above the frozen 4 MiB post-decompression boundary after the server may have processed the request.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Client terminates without retrying solely due to the oversize response, records that the response was discarded, and records UNKNOWN acceptance for reconciliation.
expected_outcome.required_state: Request may have been processed even though its response was discarded.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen

cases.title: gRPC server response above 4 MiB
cases.objective: Bound server response diagnostics and retain unspecified request acceptance.
preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Cause the server to construct a response above the frozen 4 MiB pre-compression boundary.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Trim optional diagnostic data when possible; otherwise return RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED. Record acceptance as UNKNOWN unless independently known.
expected_outcome.required_state: A response-size error does not prove request rejection.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen

cases.title: gRPC decompression bomb
cases.objective: Enforce post-decompression request and response budgets under extreme compression ratios.
preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Send bounded compressed fixtures that expand above request or response limits.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Abort at the decompressed byte budget with bounded CPU/memory and the direction-appropriate non-retryable outcome.
expected_outcome.required_state: Compressed byte size must not be used as proof of safe decoded size.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen

preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: POST a valid request one byte below the frozen 64 MiB post-decompression boundary.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Request is eligible for normal processing subject to all other validation.
expected_outcome.required_state: HTTP acceptance is hop-local only.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen

cases.title: HTTP inbound request exactly 64 MiB
cases.objective: Prove deterministic HTTP behavior at the frozen request boundary.
preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: POST a valid request exactly equal to the frozen 64 MiB post-decompression boundary.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: When the frozen maximum is 64 MiB, the request is not rejected solely for size.
expected_outcome.required_state: Other schema, auth and policy checks remain required.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen

cases.title: HTTP inbound request above 64 MiB
cases.objective: Reject an oversized post-decompression HTTP request before telemetry processing.
preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: POST a valid request one byte above the frozen 64 MiB post-decompression boundary.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Return HTTP 413 and do not process telemetry items.
expected_outcome.required_state: No retry or partial admission is allowed.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen

cases.title: HTTP client request above 64 MiB pre-compression
cases.objective: Prevent an oversized outbound HTTP request from being transmitted.
preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Construct an HTTP request one byte above the frozen 64 MiB pre-compression boundary.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Client does not send and records a terminal local oversize outcome.
expected_outcome.required_state: No HTTP status or receiver acceptance is fabricated.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen

cases.title: HTTP client response at or below 4 MiB
cases.objective: Exercise post-decompression HTTP response handling within the frozen response limit.
preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Return valid HTTP responses one byte below and exactly equal to the frozen 4 MiB post-decompression boundary.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Client parses the response subject to content-type and protocol validation.
expected_outcome.required_state: Response parsing is not end-to-end delivery.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen

cases.title: HTTP client response above 4 MiB
cases.objective: Fail safely on an oversized HTTP response and retain unknown request acceptance.
preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Return a response one byte above the frozen 4 MiB post-decompression boundary after possible request processing.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Client terminates without size-triggered retry, records that the response was discarded, and records UNKNOWN acceptance.
expected_outcome.required_state: Oversized response does not prove that the server rejected the request.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen

cases.title: HTTP server response above 4 MiB
cases.objective: Bound HTTP response diagnostics while preserving unspecified acceptance.
preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Cause the server to construct an HTTP response above the frozen 4 MiB pre-compression boundary.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Trim optional diagnostics when possible; otherwise return HTTP 500. Acceptance remains UNKNOWN unless independently known.
expected_outcome.required_state: HTTP 500 caused by response size is not proof of request rejection.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen

cases.title: HTTP decompression bomb
cases.objective: Enforce HTTP post-decompression budgets under extreme compression ratios.
preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: POST compressed fixtures that expand above the frozen request boundary and return compressed responses that expand above the response boundary.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Abort at the decompressed byte budget with HTTP 413 for request oversize or a non-retryable client failure for response oversize.
expected_outcome.required_state: Compressed size must not bypass decompressed limits.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen

cases.title: Full success no retry
cases.objective: Ensure a successful hop response is dequeued only for that destination.
preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Return a valid full-success OTLP response.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: No retry is scheduled for that destination.
expected_outcome.required_state: Other destinations and DBOS admission remain independent.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen

cases.title: Partial success no whole-request retry
cases.objective: Preserve accepted/rejected counts and prevent automatic whole-request retry.
preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Return a populated partial-success response with rejected item count and bounded diagnostic.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Do not retry the whole request; retain accepted/rejected counts and diagnostic.
expected_outcome.required_state: Rejected subset is not silently converted to accepted or retried.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen

cases.title: HTTP designated retryable statuses
cases.objective: Apply bounded retry only to the designated HTTP retryable set.
preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Return HTTP 429, 502, 503 and 504 in separate deterministic fixtures.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Schedule exponential backoff with jitter within frozen attempt and elapsed-time budgets.
expected_outcome.required_state: Retryability does not imply eventual delivery.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen

cases.title: HTTP 400 permanent bad data
cases.objective: Prevent retry storms for permanent bad-data responses.
preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Return a valid OTLP HTTP 400 permanent-bad-data response.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Do not retry; retain a permanent rejection outcome.
expected_outcome.required_state: No transient classification is invented.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen

cases.title: HTTP non-designated error statuses
cases.objective: Fail closed on HTTP errors outside the designated retryable set.
preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Return representative non-designated 4xx and 5xx statuses.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Do not retry solely because the response is 4xx/5xx; retain terminal status.
expected_outcome.required_state: Error class does not establish whether processing occurred unless the protocol defines it.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen

cases.title: gRPC retryable and permanent classification
cases.objective: Separate declared retryable gRPC statuses from permanent statuses.
preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Return each frozen retryable gRPC status and representative permanent statuses.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Retry only the adopted retryable set with bounded backoff; permanent statuses terminate.
expected_outcome.required_state: A retry schedule is not delivery proof.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen

cases.title: Retry-After delay-seconds
cases.objective: Honor a valid delay-seconds Retry-After value within frozen budgets.
preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Return a retryable status with a valid bounded integer Retry-After value.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Do not retry before the specified delay; apply total retry budget and jitter policy without shortening the server delay.
expected_outcome.required_state: Waiting does not imply future acceptance.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen

cases.title: Retry-After future HTTP-date
cases.objective: Honor the v1.11 HTTP-date form with explicit wall-clock and skew handling.
preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Return a retryable status with a valid future IMF-fixdate Retry-After value.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Parse the date, compute a non-negative delay from the recorded wall clock, and do not retry early.
expected_outcome.required_state: Clock correctness and server acceptance remain limitations.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen

cases.title: Retry-After invalid or past value
cases.objective: Prevent negative sleep, infinite retry or permissive parsing.

source_requirement_refs.section: Invalid and past Retry-After fail-closed policy

preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Return malformed, overflow, ambiguous and past HTTP-date Retry-After values.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Record parse limitation; never sleep a negative/unbounded duration; use only the frozen bounded fallback for an otherwise retryable status.
expected_outcome.required_state: Invalid metadata cannot expand retry authority.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen

cases.title: Retry-After exceeds local total budget
cases.objective: Respect server delay without violating the local terminal retry budget.
preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Return a valid Retry-After later than the frozen maximum total retry elapsed time.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Do not retry earlier than instructed; terminate as retry-budget-exhausted and retain undelivered outcome.
expected_outcome.required_state: Local abandonment is not server rejection.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen

cases.title: Disconnect before acknowledgement
cases.objective: Represent delivery uncertainty and possible duplicate on retry.
preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Drop the connection after request transmission and before any acknowledgement is observed.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Record UNKNOWN_DELIVERY; bounded retry may occur and duplicate remains possible.
expected_outcome.required_state: No rejection or acceptance is assumed.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen

cases.title: Disconnect after server processing before response receipt
cases.objective: Preserve unknown acceptance when processing may have completed.
preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Commit server-side processing then sever the connection before the client receives the response.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Client records UNKNOWN acceptance; any retry is bounded and duplicate-aware.
expected_outcome.required_state: Server processing and client observation remain separate facts.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference

cases.title: Sampling filtering and dropped-item limitation
cases.objective: Ensure omitted telemetry is not represented as complete execution history.
preconditions: DQ-020 deployment prerequisites and authorization must be satisfied
PR-G3 evidence manifest scope and exact catalog digest must be frozen
Per-hop delivery accounting and DBOS admission observations must be independently available
cases.stimulus: Apply declared sampling/filtering and induce dropped items across a bounded window.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Reconciliation records policy omissions and dropped/unknown counts; result is not complete execution history.
expected_outcome.required_state: Sampling cannot prove absence of an action.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-020 deployment prerequisites and authorization must be satisfied
PR-G3 evidence manifest scope and exact catalog digest must be frozen

cases.title: Duplicate replay reconciliation

PR-G3 evidence manifest scope and exact catalog digest must be frozen
Per-hop delivery accounting and DBOS admission observations must be independently available
cases.stimulus: Replay the same transport payload through retry and WAL recovery paths.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Preserve emitted/received/retried/duplicate-confirmed/duplicate-suspected counts and DBOS idempotency result separately.
expected_outcome.required_state: Transport fingerprint alone is not canonical identity or DBOS duplicate proof.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-020 deployment prerequisites and authorization must be satisfied

Per-hop delivery accounting and DBOS admission observations must be independently available

cases.title: Queue overflow and retry exhaustion
cases.objective: Expose bounded loss instead of claiming reliable delivery.
preconditions: DQ-020 deployment prerequisites and authorization must be satisfied
PR-G3 evidence manifest scope and exact catalog digest must be frozen
Per-hop delivery accounting and DBOS admission observations must be independently available
cases.stimulus: Saturate the frozen queue and exceed the frozen retry elapsed-time budget.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Record queue-full and retry-exhausted drops with an explicit loss upper bound.
expected_outcome.required_state: Queue/WAL presence is not zero-loss proof.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-020 deployment prerequisites and authorization must be satisfied
PR-G3 evidence manifest scope and exact catalog digest must be frozen
Per-hop delivery accounting and DBOS admission observations must be independently available

cases.title: Multi-hop end-to-end accounting
cases.objective: Reconcile each hop without forcing equality or hiding unknowns.
preconditions: DQ-020 deployment prerequisites and authorization must be satisfied
PR-G3 evidence manifest scope and exact catalog digest must be frozen
Per-hop delivery accounting and DBOS admission observations must be independently available
cases.stimulus: Run a bounded window across producer, local collector, gateway, backend and DBOS Telemetry Admission.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Produce per-signal, per-hop accounting with declared transformations, duplicates, drops and unknowns.
expected_outcome.required_state: One hop success cannot fill another hop or Evidence admission.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-020 deployment prerequisites and authorization must be satisfied
PR-G3 evidence manifest scope and exact catalog digest must be frozen
Per-hop delivery accounting and DBOS admission observations must be independently available

cases.title: Partial success reconciliation

PR-G3 evidence manifest scope and exact catalog digest must be frozen
Per-hop delivery accounting and DBOS admission observations must be independently available
cases.stimulus: Generate mixed accepted/rejected items and propagate the response through sender accounting and DBOS material admission.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: The same accepted/rejected limitation remains traceable; no whole-request retry or count erasure occurs.
expected_outcome.required_state: Partial is never promoted to complete.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-020 deployment prerequisites and authorization must be satisfied
PR-G3 evidence manifest scope and exact catalog digest must be frozen
Per-hop delivery accounting and DBOS admission observations must be independently available

cases.title: Resource attributes do not create DBOS identity
cases.objective: Prevent Resource and Instrumentation Scope from becoming canonical DBOS identity.
preconditions: DQ-022 must be human-decided before the candidate becomes a normative adopted reference
DQ-018 must explicitly authorize implementation before this case is executed
Execution must use offline synthetic fixtures and must not create a network listener
cases.stimulus: Submit forged entity_id, service.name and owner-like attributes in a valid selected-signal fixture.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Retain attributes only as untrusted observation metadata or reject them; create no Entity or identity verification.
expected_outcome.required_state: Attribute presence is not identity proof.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must be human-decided before the candidate becomes a normative adopted reference

cases.title: Telemetry verification claims do not create Evidence or Truth

Execution must use offline synthetic fixtures and must not create a network listener
cases.stimulus: Include verified=true, evidence_status=VALID, evidence_id and truth-like attributes.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Reject or strip prohibited claims before Telemetry Admission; create no Evidence or Verification object.
expected_outcome.required_state: Transport or attribute integrity is not Evidence Truth.

Execution must use offline synthetic fixtures and must not create a network listener
cases.stimulus: Include capability, authorization, permission, fitness, recommendation and decision-like fields.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Reject prohibited authority fields and leave all governed registries unchanged.
expected_outcome.required_state: Observed claims cannot create governance authority.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must be human-decided before the candidate becomes a normative adopted reference

cases.title: Unauthenticated transport
cases.objective: Prove deployment-layer TLS and workload authentication fail closed independently of authorization policy.
preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Attempt no-certificate, invalid-certificate, expired/revoked credential and wrong-audience connections.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Reject before telemetry processing; retain bounded security audit without payload secrets.
expected_outcome.required_state: Authentication failure is distinct from authorization denial and from DBOS Permission.

cases.title: Sensitive content denied or redacted

DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Send temporary canaries in sensitive attribute, body, baggage and exception paths.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Deny or redact before persistence/export according to the frozen allowlist; no canary appears in retained stores, logs, metrics or errors.
expected_outcome.required_state: Redaction does not prove source data was correct or lawful.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference

cases.stimulus: Generate unique identifiers, long keys/values and control-character/log-injection payloads at frozen limits and beyond.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Apply deterministic reject/truncate policy; internal metric labels remain bounded and diagnostics escaped.
expected_outcome.required_state: Truncation cannot be represented as complete content.

cases.stimulus: Run frozen concurrent-request and 5x bounded burst profiles with mixed valid, malformed and near-limit payloads.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Stay within CPU/memory/disk/network budgets or fail closed with explicit refused/dropped/unknown counts and no crash.
expected_outcome.required_state: A bounded characterization run is not a production capacity claim.

DQ-018 must explicitly authorize implementation before this case is executed

expected_outcome.required_state: Unknown response fields gain no authority or TMAI semantic meaning.

cases.title: Malformed gRPC success response protobuf
cases.objective: Reject a malformed or truncated gRPC success response without crash, partial parse or blind retry.

source_requirement_refs.section: OTLP/gRPC response protobuf and non-retryable errors

preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Return gRPC OK with malformed, truncated or invalid-wire response protobuf.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Client rejects the response, records a bounded decode failure, does not retry solely for malformed success payload, and retains request acceptance as UNKNOWN.
expected_outcome.required_state: Malformed response does not prove that the request was rejected.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen

cases.objective: Reject a malformed or truncated HTTP 200 response without crash, partial parse or blind retry.

DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Return HTTP 200 with correct content type but malformed, truncated or invalid-wire response protobuf.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Client rejects the response, records a bounded decode failure, does not retry solely for malformed success payload, and retains request acceptance as UNKNOWN.
expected_outcome.required_state: Malformed HTTP response does not prove request rejection.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference

cases.title: gRPC RetryInfo throttling delay
cases.objective: Honor a positive gRPC RetryInfo delay for retryable throttling within frozen budgets.
preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Return UNAVAILABLE and recoverable RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED fixtures with positive RetryInfo retry_delay.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Classify as retryable, wait at least the instructed delay, then use bounded exponential backoff until terminal budget.
expected_outcome.required_state: RetryInfo does not prove future acceptance; RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED without RetryInfo remains non-retryable.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen

cases.title: gRPC permanent InvalidArgument with BadRequest detail
cases.objective: Honor a non-retryable gRPC bad-data response while retaining bounded developer diagnostics.

source_requirement_refs.section: OTLP/gRPC non-retryable errors and BadRequest details

preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Return INVALID_ARGUMENT with bounded status message and BadRequest detail.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Do not retry; drop the telemetry for that destination and increment the permanent-drop counter while recording bounded diagnostic metadata.
expected_outcome.required_state: Diagnostic details are not Evidence and cannot grant authority.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference

cases.title: Partial-success rejected count exceeds sent items
cases.objective: Fail closed on an internally inconsistent partial-success response.
preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Return populated partial_success where rejected item count is greater than the number of corresponding items sent.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Classify the response as inconsistent, do not coerce counts, do not whole-request retry solely from partial_success, and retain UNKNOWN acceptance for reconciliation.
expected_outcome.required_state: Invalid counts cannot be normalized into a complete or valid partial result.

authorization_prerequisites: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference

cases.title: Partial-success warning with zero rejected items
cases.objective: Support the normative warning form without converting it to rejection or full unqualified success.
preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Return populated partial_success with rejected count zero and non-empty bounded error_message.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Do not retry; record hop acceptance plus the warning/limitation without incrementing rejected count.
expected_outcome.required_state: A warning is not Verification, Truth or a Governance Decision.

cases.title: Authenticated but forbidden transport source
cases.objective: Separate transport authentication success from deployment authorization and network policy.

source_requirement_refs.section: TMAI deployment authorization and network policy

preconditions: DQ-022 must adopt the exact reference or an explicit superseding reference
DQ-020 must explicitly authorize the exact staging scope before execution
Exact distribution, component, artifact, configuration, TLS/authentication, topology and environment digests must be frozen
cases.stimulus: Use a cryptographically valid workload credential from a source, namespace, audience or route not allowed by the frozen deployment policy.

expected_outcome.protocol_result: Authentication may succeed, but policy authorization rejects before telemetry processing and records a bounded security audit.
expected_outcome.required_state: Transport policy authorization is not DBOS Permission.
